case_title: CREDITORS ADJUSTMENT BUREAU, INC. VS. CAMYS TRUCKS L.L.C. AKA CAMYS TRUCKS LLC ET AL

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION RE ATTORNEY'S FEES PURSUANT CIVIL CODE 1717 (TRANSACTION ID # 100220621) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CREDITORS ADJUSTMENT BUREAU, INC.

REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, COURT JUDGMENT, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $262.07 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 (TRANSACTION ID # 100220621) AS TO DEFENDANT CAMYS TRUCKS L.L.C. AKA CAMYS TRUCKS LLC
DECLARATION OF BENJAMIN SEEMAN PURSUANT TO C.C.P. SECTION 585 (TRANSACTION ID # 100220621) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CREDITORS ADJUSTMENT BUREAU, INC.
DECLARATION OF ERIC A. GOWEY RE METHOD OF CALCULATING INTEREST (TRANSACTION ID # 100220621) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CREDITORS ADJUSTMENT BUREAU, INC.
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 100220621) AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 THROUGH 10, INCLUSIVE
SUMMONS ISSUED (TRANSACTION ID # 100212915) TO PLAINTIFF CREDITORS ADJUSTMENT BUREAU, INC.

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 100212915) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CREDITORS ADJUSTMENT BUREAU, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT CAMYS TRUCKS L.L.C. AKA CAMYS TRUCKS LLC DOES 1 THROUGH 10, INCLUSIVE NO SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET NOT FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  MAR-13-2024
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 100217591) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CREDITORS ADJUSTMENT BUREAU, INC. SERVED SEP-21-2023, MAIL AS TO DEFENDANT CAMYS TRUCKS L.L.C. AKA CAMYS TRUCKS LLC
CIVIL CASE COVERSHEET FILED (TRANSACTION ID # 100212915) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CREDITORS ADJUSTMENT BUREAU, INC.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CREDITORS ADJUSTMENT BUREAU, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CAMYS TRUCKS L.L.C. AKA CAMYS TRUCKS LLC $5,400.00 PRINCIPAL, $875.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $683.62 INTEREST, $262.07 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $7,220.69, SEE SCANNED DOC
